# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Current `main` branch is supported for security fixes.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Use GitHub Security Advisories private reporting for this repository:
- https://github.com/pochy/HaoHao/security/advisories

When reporting, include:
- Affected area (`backend`, `frontend`, auth/session/CSRF, docs/OpenAPI access)
- Reproduction steps or proof-of-concept
- Potential impact
- Suggested mitigation (if available)

We will acknowledge receipt within 3 business days and provide status updates until resolution.
